{{Quote|The art of Teräs Käsi is about control and mastery of one's self.|Joclad Danva|<ref name="Threats of the Galaxy">''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]''</ref>}}
'''Joclad Danva''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. A master of the fighting technique called [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]], Danva fought and died in the opening [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] early in his childhood, Danva was taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]] from the [[Jedi academy|academy]] there, Danva was selected by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] to become a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and travel [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] studying the ways of the Jedi through active duty. Eventually passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], Danva was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|knighted]] and began his independent studies down the path of the [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardian]]. This further research led him to become a master of the martial arts form known as [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]], a highly physical form of fighting.<ref name="MSI" /> Combining this with his prowess in [[Form VI/Legends|Form VI]] of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]], Danva was a formidable opponent in a fight.<ref name="Fightsaber" />

[[File:Girljedi.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Joclad Danva in the arena.]]
Often traveling to [[Bunduki/Legends|Bunduki]] to participate in the Teräs Käsi matches held there annually, Danva refrained from using the Force against his opponents as he believed that gave him an unfair advantage. This was accomplished by self-severing his connection to the Force, a rare Jedi technique.<ref name="MSI" /> During the [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] annual [[Palawa Band]] Teräs Käsi tournament on Bunduki, Danva and the non-Force-sensitive martial artist [[Phow Ji]] were the last two contestants standing, having won all other combat sessions. In a heated final match that spanned nearly an hour,<ref name="Jedi Defeated" /> Danva was defeated by Ji, who took the victory as proof that the Force did not exist.<ref name="MSI" /><ref name="Jedi Defeated">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|sports/1359_1.html|Jedi Defeated for Teräs Käsi Title}}</ref> Returning to the Jedi Temple after the competition, Danva was summoned by [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to join a massive [[Jedi assault team/Legends|Jedi strike team]] that was headed for [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Joining his fellow Jedi, Danva flew out to Geonosis and set his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] down in the dusty plains of the world, before marching into the [[Petranaki arena]] where Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] were being prepared for execution by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Fightsaber" />

Following Windu's cue, Danva and the other Jedi spread throughout the arena ignited their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] and began cutting down the hordes of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] filling the arena. After a great battle on the arena floor, Danva and the twenty-some Jedi left standing received an ultimatum from Confederacy leader [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]: surrender and join him, or die. Choosing to take their chances with the battle droids, the Jedi prepared to fight to the death when [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] arrived with the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. Danva had the chance to reach a ship and escape the arena, but died whilst attempting to escape.<ref name="Fightsaber" />

==Powers and abilities==
[[File:Joclad_Danva_TLC.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Joclad Danva]]
Joclad Danva was known for his fighting prowess, both armed with two [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] and with his bare hands. A lightsaber enthusiast,<ref name="MSI" /> he was an extremely skilled practitioner of [[Form VI/Legends|Niman]]<ref name="Fightsaber" /> and Jar'Kai, considered to be one of the most powerful duelists in the Jedi Order. Such was his skill, that many of his sparring matches were recorded in the archives of the Jedi Order, and he could hold his own against the majority of Jedi in combat.<ref name="MSI" /> Danva was an authority in the Order on the hand-to-hand discipline known as Teräs Käsi, and was a highly proficient martial artist.<ref name="Fightsaber" /><ref name="MSI" /><ref name="Jedi Defeated" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|This is Kyle Rowling, a key member of Nick Gillard's stunt team who doubled for Count Dooku in Episodes II and III. Here we get to see his face as Joclad Danva, who I named back in the day.|Pablo Hidalgo|<ref name="Pablo Danva">{{Twitter|pabl0hidalgo|status/1497689061095460864|[[Pablo Hidalgo]]|quote=This is Kyle Rowling, a key member of Nick Gillard's stunt team who doubled for Count Dooku in Episodes II and III. Here we get to see his face as Joclad Danva, who I named back in the day.|archivedate=20231016041513}}</ref>}}
Joclad Danva was portrayed by [[Kyle Rowling]], the partial dueling and stunt double for [[Christopher Lee]] (Count Dooku) in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']], respectively. The character was named by [[Pablo Hidalgo]].<ref name="Pablo Danva" />
